title: TaskSpec
description: Typed JSON object emitted by Tier 1 Intake and frozen for the rest of the run. Locks jurisdictions, source profile, topic, output type, and company-context pointer. Every sub-agent reads this; the orchestrator binds its values into tool parameter schemas at run start.

created_at.description: Set when the requester's message lands in the intake.

frozen_at.description: Set when Tier 1 finishes intake and dispatches to the orchestrator. After this, TaskSpec is immutable for the run.

raw_message_id.description: Channel-native message id (Slack ts, Discord snowflake, etc.).

verbatim_question.description: Original message text, captured exactly as the requester wrote it (no paraphrase). Used by Renderer to echo the question at the top of every deliverable; used by Critic to detect drift between the answer and the original ask.

jurisdictions.description: Locked jurisdictions for this run. R2 JurisdictionLock binds every KB tool's jurisdiction parameter enum to exactly this list.

topic.description: Topic taxonomy keyed to the company-context risk-vectors and skill catalog. 'other' is permitted but should be rare — every common topic should be enumerated.

path.description: Path to the company-context pack, typically 'company-context/'.

version_hash.description: Optional content-hash of the company-context pack at run start. Captured to make audit reproducible.

output_type.description: Which template the Renderer will use. Determined at intake from channel + complexity. 'incomplete_notice' is only set by R11 / R15 (orchestrator-emitted, not requester-emitted).

requires_fresh.description: When true, R10 CurrencyTag tightens the staleness threshold to source-specific minimums and the orchestrator triggers synchronous corpus refresh on stale hits. Set true for time-sensitive questions like 'is this bill currently in effect?'.

priority.description: Routing hint to the orchestrator. Does not change rule enforcement; may change retrieval breadth and revise-loop budget.

deadline.description: Optional requester-supplied deadline. The orchestrator may downgrade depth (fewer revise loops) when approaching deadline.

pre_flight_notes.description: Operator-supplied notes captured during Tier-1 intake (e.g., 'caller said this is for the Smith matter, prior memos in Notion at <url>'). Visible to sub-agents.
